# Theorem: Comment Injection Shifts Visible Narrative

## Statement
If comment narrative is represented by mean embedding \(n\), and \(M\) seeded comments with mean vector \(m\) are added to \(C\) organic comments:

\[
\tilde{n}=\frac{Cn+Mm}{C+M}
\]

The shift is:

\[
\tilde{n}-n=\frac{M}{C+M}(m-n)
\]

## Relevance
Early seeded comments have large influence when \(C\) is small.
